phrases.intent_en: Ask if the elevator to the top is working today
phrases.text_local: L'ascenseur pour accéder au sommet fonctionne-t-il aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah-san-SUHR poor ak-say-DAY oh so-MAY fonk-syon-TEEL oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: A free elevator on the seafront side rises to the hilltop — very useful as the hill is 90 metres high.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the panoramic view from the top
phrases.text_local: La vue panoramique est-elle accessible depuis le belvédère ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah vyoo pah-no-rah-MEEK eh-TEL ak-se-SEEBL deh-PWEE leh bel-vay-DEHR
phrases.cultural_note: The hilltop offers one of the best views on the Riviera — the old port to the left, the Baie des Anges stretching west.

responses.english: The view is beautiful on clear days.
responses.phonetic: lah VOO eh mah-nyee-FEEK par tahn KLAIR
responses.local: La vue est magnifique par temps clair.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waterfall is located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la cascade artificielle dans le parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah kas-KAHD ar-tee-fee-SYEL dan leh PARK
phrases.cultural_note: The hill features a man-made waterfall near the top — a popular landmark and photo spot.

responses.english: At the end of the path, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh BOO doo shuh-MAHN soor lah DRWAHT
responses.local: Au bout du chemin, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the park is free to enter
phrases.text_local: L'entrée du parc du château est-elle gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lan-TRAY doo PARK doo sha-TOH eh-TEL gra-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: The park is free and open daily. Only the elevator costs a small fee (or use the free stairs).

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the path down to the old port
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un sentier pour descendre directement vers le vieux port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un san-TYAY poor day-SAN-dreh dee-rek-teh-MAN vehr leh vyuh POR
phrases.cultural_note: Steep staircases descend directly to the old port on the east side of the hill.

responses.english: Go down the stairs on the east side.
